Kissflow

Low-code work platform for process automation and project management

6/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$1500/moStarting Price
2012Founded

About Kissflow

Kissflow is a ai automation platform founded in 2012. It positions itself as “Low-code work platform for process automation and project management” and is best suited for mid market companies, process owners, HR teams. Pricing starts at $1500/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Visual BuilderYes
Code SupportYes
Api ConnectionsYes
SchedulingYes
Conditional LogicYes
Error HandlingYes
Team CollaborationYes
TemplatesYes
Webhook SupportYes
Ai ActionsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Combines workflow and project management
  • Easy form and process builder
  • Good for business process digitization

Cons

  • Expensive for small teams
  • Limited integration options
  • Not ideal for complex technical automations
